definition:
1. conformable to custom, usage , or law, customary, prescriptive, established, lawful, rightful , (Euripides):—; νόμιμόν [ ἐστί] τινι ποιεῖν τι (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. νόμιμα, ων, τά, usages, customs , (Herdotus Historicus), attic 
3. funeral rites , Lat. justa, (Thucydides) 
4. adverb -μως, (Plato Philosophus): comparative -ώτερον (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
